characters.name: ANNA
characters.description: Väike inimene, rõõmsameelne tüdruk. Blondid lühikesed juuksed, suured sinised silmad. Seljas kollane pikkade varrukatega särk ja sinised püksid. Sõbralik ja uudishimulik näoilme. Armas multifilmistiil.

characters.name: ARTUR
characters.description: Väike inimene, naeratav poiss. Pruunid lühikesed juuksed, suured rohelised silmad. Seljas punane pikkade varrukatega särk ja hallid püksid. Rõõmsameelne ja mänguhimuline näoilme. Armas multifilmistiil.

locations.name: Laste mängutuba
locations.description: Cozy children's playroom with light blue walls and a soft patterned rug on the floor. A large window on the back wall shows a view of snowy trees outside. There's a wooden toy chest in one corner and a low bookshelf along one wall. Scattered colorful toy blocks are on the floor. Warm and inviting atmosphere. Cartoon style.

pages.scene: Anna and Artur are standing in a warm, cozy children's playroom (loc1). They are looking thoughtful and observant. The window shows a snowy landscape outside.

Anna and Artur are still in the playroom (loc1). Anna points playfully towards the window where snow is clearly visible, then looks at Artur with a mischievous, excited look. Artur smiles back, understanding her unspoken idea.

Anna and Artur are looking towards a pile of colorful blankets in a corner of the playroom (loc1), their faces bright with a shared, exciting plan to build something cozy. They are both smiling enthusiastically.

Anna holds a large, brightly colored blanket, pulling it gently from a low basket in the playroom (loc1). Artur is reaching for another soft blanket from a nearby shelf. Several blankets are now starting to gather on the floor.

Anna is carefully carrying a stack of soft, colorful pillows, giggling playfully in the playroom (loc1). Artur is helping her gather more pillows from a small sofa. The collected blankets are now forming a small pile nearby.

Anna and Artur are actively constructing their fort in the playroom (loc1). One large blanket is draped over two chairs, forming a basic roof. They are both working together, carefully arranging other blankets to create walls for their cozy hideout.

The pillow fort is now mostly complete and looks like a cozy, inviting tent made of blankets over chairs, with a clear opening in the playroom (loc1). Anna and Artur are putting the final touches, perhaps arranging a pillow just inside the entrance, looking proud.

Anna and Artur are cheerfully crawling into the opening of their finished blanket fort in the playroom (loc1). Their faces are full of anticipation and joy, excited to explore their new cozy space. The fort looks inviting.

Anna and Artur are sitting comfortably inside their blanket fort, surrounded by soft pillows and warm blankets in the playroom (loc1). They are smiling warmly at each other, enjoying the cozy atmosphere. A gentle, soft glow illuminates the interior.

Anna and Artur are still inside their fort in the playroom (loc1), looking out from the entrance with bright, joyful expressions. They are very happy with their cozy creation. The snowy view outside the window is still visible in the background, contrasting with their warmth.
